claim_boundary: This cocotb report measures RTL pressure behavior only. It is not L5/L6 silicon, DRAM, LPDDR, Android, or phone bandwidth evidence.

findings.name: status
findings.reason: measured cache-pressure reports must be producer-status pass; stale blocked reports stay blocked

findings.name: captured_utc
findings.reason: captured_utc must be an ISO-8601 timestamp with timezone

findings.name: claim_boundary
findings.reason: claim_boundary must explicitly block phone/release promotion

findings.name: generated_by_sha256
findings.reason: generated_by_sha256 must hash-bind the cocotb harness

findings.name: result_artifacts
findings.reason: measured pressure reports must hash-bind cocotb JUnit XML result_artifacts

findings.name: lmbench_memory_runner
findings.reason: RV64 cross toolchain or lmbench source absent

findings.name: l5_l6_memory_real_target_reports
findings.reason: Phone-class memory evidence requires real-target L5/L6 bandwidth, latency, contention, Android shared-buffer, and scorecard artifacts.

observations: L1D sustained multiple outstanding line acquires.
L2 accepted an L1D miss, requested L3, and returned a refill.
L3 accepted an L2 miss, requested SLC, and returned a refill.
SLC serviced CPU and display QoS misses and pulsed display reservation evidence.
